title: stelis pastoensis
intro: Stelis pastoensis, also known as the Pasto's stelis, is a species of orchid found in the tropical regions of Colombia. It is a type of epiphytic orchid that grows on trees, with its unique flowers and leaves providing medicinal properties due to the presence of various alkaloids and flavonoids. The medicinal properties of Stelis pastoensis have been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, providing several health benefits such as wound healing and immune system support. The herbal preparations of Stelis pastoensis can be used in various forms, including extracts, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
